violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Working container holding food item * was not labeled properly to identify contents. -All grab n go items (made in-house) do not have ingredient/allergen labels and are not date marked on the package.

Dispensing equipment - Design and construction. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not properly designed and/or constructed to prevent contamination. -Ice bin lid is not well attached, falls off when opening ice machine bin.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Minimal debris at underside surface behind nozzle of Caribbean slushie machine. -Some sticky residue/splatter at cabinets below beverage line. -Tea dispenser catch tray has liquid build up.
